notFound.title: Looks like you're off the map.
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist, got moved, or is just really good at hiding.
notFound.footnote: At least getting lost here doesn't require asking for directions.

unauthorized.title: You'll need a badge for this one.
unauthorized.description: This area is for members only. Sign in if you have access, or head back to safer ground.
unauthorized.footnote: No badge, no entry. Rules are rules.

forbidden.title: Nice try, but no.
forbidden.description: You're signed in, but you don't have permission to open this page.
forbidden.footnote: Even the server raised an eyebrow.

serverError.title: Something went sideways.
serverError.description: Our servers had a moment. We're on it — try again in a bit.
serverError.footnote: It's not you. It's definitely us.

maintenance.title: We'll be right back.
maintenance.description: We're doing some quick maintenance. Grab a coffee — we won't be long.
maintenance.footnote: Even websites need a stretch break.
